title: EutrophicationAquaticFreshwaterMaterialResult
description: EutrophicationAquaticFreshwaterMaterialResult: Result class for resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater for a particular Material and EPD.

A1.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

A2.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the Transport module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

A4.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the Transport module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

A5.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the Construction Installation Process module in the Construction Process stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

B7.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the Operational Water Use module in the Use stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

B1toB7.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the full Use Stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

C1.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to the De-construction Demolition module in the End of Life stage. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

D.description: Resulting Eutrophication - aquatic freshwater relating to benefits and loads beyond the system boundary. Property has a quantity of type EutrophicationAquaticFreshwater measured in [kg P eq].

MaterialName.description: Name of the physical material evaluated.
